summary: A Go-based modular CLI tool with a plugin system that runs assertions, detects configurations, and generates reports such as JUnit.
concerns: recent commits are entirely automated agent metadata archiving with no functional code changes
uncommitted staged and untracked files suggest incomplete work
key hot files are mostly tests rather than implementation files
suggestions: investigate the uncommitted changes to understand current work-in-progress
review functional implementation files in detector and schema packages
clean up automated agent tracking commits from the main branch history
